label: AI visual meme production
description: AI-generated or AI-assisted short visual content with Lego-like or pop-cultural framing.

label: Humor, ridicule and humiliation framing
description: Emotional framing that makes adversaries appear weak, corrupt or absurd.

label: Cross-platform seeding
description: Publishing or resharing across Telegram, X, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube and news mirrors.

label: Mirror / reupload persistence
description: Content survives takedowns through mirrors, reposts or source-page variants.

label: Amplifier reposting
description: Community or influencer accounts amplify the same or similar content.

label: Coverage leverage
description: Earned media coverage increases awareness and reframes the campaign for broader audiences.

label: Source ambiguity
description: Unclear relationship between production groups, state media, proxies or community mirrors.

label: Rapid event-response content
description: Fast content variants tied to breaking events or new political claims.

label: Language/audience bridging
description: Use of English, captions, rap or Western pop-culture references for non-domestic audiences.

label: Human-review dependency
description: Analyst review is required because automated labels may overstate origin, intent or authenticity.
